Effective Date: 02/04/2026 23:52 Type: Physician Progress Note
81-year-old female patient presented to the ER with fatigue and black stools. Occult blood positive seen by GI no scopes, hemoglobin
Diagnosed with multifocal anemia pneumonia started on antibiotics. Thought to be aspiration. Dysphagia, did not clear speech therapy but
refused tube feeding or G-tube placement. Placed on puréed diet. Encephalopathy improved
Acute on chronic CHF exacerbation also stabilized on diuretics. Admitted to us for rehab
Past medical history hypertension CHF hypothyroidism depression and chronic A-fib
Apixaban for anticoagulation for chronic A-fib

97110: Pt performed 20 mins of resisted cycling exercise at level 5-6 to improve overall strength, cardiovascular

97530: Assessed safe trfs to/from WC c armrest IND; mult reps of sit<>stand from WC - IND to maintain quality and
